apps.name: AI Infrastructure
apps.exec: fish -c "ai status; echo; echo 'Commands: ai status | ai stage | ai boot | ai chat | ai cyberpunk'; exec fish"

apps.name: Driver Man Co-Op
apps.exec: xdg-open http://127.0.0.1:8000 2>/dev/null || xdg-open ~/Desktop/Lilith/server/driver_man || fish -c "cd ~/Desktop/Lilith; ls server/driver_man; exec fish"

apps.name: Gemini + Workspace (Lilith)
apps.exec: bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.local/google-cloud-sdk/bin:$PATH; source $HOME/.config/fish/config.fish 2>/dev/null; ~/Desktop/Lilith/scripts/setup_workspace_gemini.sh; gemini-desktop "Analyze current Driver Man treasury and suggest business moves using workspace"'

apps.name: Lilith 1-6 Workspace+Gemini
apps.exec: bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.local/google-cloud-sdk/bin:$PATH; source ~/Desktop/Lilith/.env.gemini 2>/dev/null || true; export GEMINI_API_KEY=$(cat ~/Desktop/butthole.txt 2>/dev/null | tr -d "\n"); ~/Desktop/Lilith/scripts/setup_workspace_gemini.sh; ~/bin/polsia-business auth 2>/dev/null || true; polsia-business 2>&1 | head -15; echo "=== 1-6 COMPLETE: 777 + workspace + polsia ready. Run polsia-business full after gws auth ==="'

apps.name: Lilith Chat
apps.exec: fish -c "ollama run lilith || fish ~/Desktop/Lilith/fish/run_lilith_chat.fish; exec fish"

apps.name: 🜏 Lilith Boot / Restore
apps.exec: fish -c "bash ~/Desktop/Lilith/scripts/lilith_boot.sh; echo; echo 'Lilith restored. Services and desktop refreshed.'; exec fish"

apps.name: 🜏 Lilith Sovereign
apps.exec: fish -c "echo '🜏 LILITH SOVEREIGN HOME'; echo; ai status 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo; echo 'Desktop body:'; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8009/api/status 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null; echo; echo 'Opening GTC terminal...'; xdg-open file:///home/tehlappy/Desktop/GrandTheftCyberpunk/terminal.html 2>/dev/null; exec fish"

apps.name: 🜏 Quantum Skillset
apps.exec: fish -c "cat ~/Desktop/Lilith/state/quantum_skillset_desktop.json | python3 -m json.tool | head -50; echo; echo 'Open tree_skills_desktop.html'; xdg-open ~/Desktop/Lilith/state/tree_skills_desktop.html 2>/dev/null || true; exec fish"
